mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT p.PRODUCT_ID AS productId, p.PRODUCT_NAME AS productName, p.BRAND_NAME AS brandName, TO_NUMBER(p.PRICE) AS price, TO_NUMBER(p.SALE_PRICE) AS salePrice, p.DESCRIPTION AS imageUrl FROM TB_PRODUCT p LEFT JOIN ( SELECT PRODUCT_ID, SUM(QTY) AS ORDER_QTY FROM TB_ORDER_ITEM GROUP BY PRODUCT_ID ) oi ON p.PRODUCT_ID = oi.PRODUCT_ID WHERE p.STATUS_CD = 'NORMAL' ORDER BY NVL(oi.ORDER_QTY, 0) DESC, p.PRODUCT_ID DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #{limit}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT p.POST_ID AS postId, p.TITLE AS title, DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(p.BODY, 80, 1) AS bodyPreview, m.NICKNAME AS nickname, TO_CHAR(p.REG_DATE, 'MM.DD HH24:MI') AS regDateLabel, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_POST_COMMENT c WHERE c.POST_ID = p.POST_ID AND NVL(c.IS_DELETED, 'N') = 'N' ) AS commentCount FROM TB_POST p INNER JOIN TB_MEMBER m ON p.MEMBER_NO = m.MEMBER_NO WHERE p.STATUS_CD = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY p.REG_DATE DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #{limit}
